mechanics.excerpt: Variable Level Traits Many traits have several levels; For example, character can have from one to three levels of the Well-Connected Trait (see 891. Levels are variations in trait' Iisted cost Or value For example the three levels of Well Connected cost 2 , and 6 points respectively: When variable trait is awarded in the Life Path, the char- acter receives at the lowest level listed_ unless the path states otherwise If the character gets trait ne or she already has; increase its level by one.
